changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'DNA Extraction Kit' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'DNA Extraction Kit', 'Complete kit for genomic DNA extraction from blood, tissue, and cell samples', 'REAGENT', 'Extraction', 'Qiagen', 'QIA-69504', '15-25°C (Room Temperature)', 'kits', 5, 30, 180, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'RNA Preservation Buffer' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'RNA Preservation Buffer', 'Stabilizes and protects RNA in biological samples for downstream processing', 'REAGENT', 'Preservation', 'Thermo Fisher', 'AM7020', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'ml', 100, 45, 90, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'PCR Master Mix' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'PCR Master Mix', '2X concentrated ready-to-use PCR master mix with Taq polymerase', 'REAGENT', 'Amplification', 'Promega', 'M7122', '-20°C (Frozen)', 'reactions', 50, 60, 30, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Malaria RDT Buffer' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Malaria RDT Buffer', 'Assay buffer solution for malaria rapid diagnostic tests', 'REAGENT', 'Diagnostics', 'SD Biosensor', 'SDB-05FK60', '2-30°C', 'ml', 50, 30, 60, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Cell Lysis Buffer' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Cell Lysis Buffer', 'Non-denaturing lysis buffer for cell membrane disruption', 'REAGENT', 'Extraction', 'Cell Signaling', 'CST-9803', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'ml', 100, 30, 60, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Proteinase K Solution' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Proteinase K Solution', 'Broad-spectrum serine protease for protein digestion in nucleic acid extraction', 'REAGENT', 'Extraction', 'Qiagen', 'QIA-19131', '2-8°C (Refrigerated)', 'ml', 20, 45, 90, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Ethanol (Molecular Biology Grade)' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Ethanol (Molecular Biology Grade)', '100% ethanol suitable for molecular biology applications', 'REAGENT', 'General', 'Sigma-Aldrich', 'E7023', '15-25°C (Room Temperature)', 'liters', 2, 90, 365, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Nuclease-Free Water' AND item_type = 'REAGENT';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, low_stock_threshold, expiration_alert_days, stability_after_opening, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Nuclease-Free Water', 'DNase/RNase-free water for molecular biology applications', 'REAGENT', 'General', 'Ambion', 'AM9937', '15-25°C (Room Temperature)', 'ml', 500, 60, 180, 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Microcentrifuge' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Microcentrifuge', 'High-speed benchtop microcentrifuge for 1.5/2.0ml tubes', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Separation', 'Eppendorf', '5424R', 'Room Temperature', 'units', 'Y', 'Standard 1.5ml/2.0ml microtubes', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'PCR Thermocycler' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'PCR Thermocycler', '96-well gradient thermal cycler for PCR amplification', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Amplification', 'Bio-Rad', 'T100', 'Room Temperature', 'units', 'Y', '96-well plates, 0.2ml PCR tubes', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Vortex Mixer' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Vortex Mixer', 'Variable speed vortex mixer for sample mixing', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Mixing', 'Scientific Industries', 'SI-0236', 'Room Temperature', 'units', 'N', 'Standard tubes and plates', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Micropipette Set' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Micropipette Set', 'Set of calibrated micropipettes (P10, P20, P200, P1000)', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Liquid Handling', 'Gilson', 'PIPETMAN-SET', 'Room Temperature', 'sets', 'Y', 'Standard pipette tips', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'Biosafety Cabinet Class II' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.comment: Seed Biosafety Cabinet Class II instrument
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'Biosafety Cabinet Class II', 'Class II Type A2 biological safety cabinet for sample processing', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Containment', 'Thermo Fisher', '1300-Series', 'Laboratory Installation', 'units', 'Y', 'HEPA filtered workspace', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'NanoDrop Spectrophotometer' AND item_type = 'CARTRIDGE';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_item ( id, fhir_uuid, name, description, item_type, category, manufacturer, catalog_number, storage_requirements, units, calibration_required, compatible_analyzers, is_active ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_item_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), 'NanoDrop Spectrophotometer', 'Micro-volume UV-Vis spectrophotometer for nucleic acid quantification', 'CARTRIDGE', 'Quantification', 'Thermo Fisher', 'ND-2000', 'Room Temperature', 'units', 'Y', 'Direct sample measurement (1-2µl)', 'Y' );

changeSet.author: mherman22

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_lot WHERE lot_number = 'EK-2024-001';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.inventory_lot ( id, fhir_uuid, inventory_item_id, lot_number, expiration_date, receipt_date, initial_quantity, current_quantity, qc_status, status ) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.inventory_lot_seq'), uuid_generate_v4(), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'DNA Extraction Kit' AND item_type = 'REAGENT'), 'EK-2024-001', NOW() + INTERVAL '12 months', NOW(), 50, 50, 'PASSED', 'ACTIVE' );

changeSet.author: mherman22
